Economic Analysis
Jan 15, 2025
Featured

📉 IMF Warns of 1.5% Economic Contraction in Iraq for 2025 — Is IQD Revaluation Becoming a Necessity?

The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has issued a sobering forecast for Iraq's economy, projecting a 1.5% contraction for 2025. This announcement has significant implications for the Iraqi Dinar (IQD) and raises questions about the necessity of currency revaluation.

8 min read
